name: Foundation/cors
description: CORS preflight conformance tests (from CorsTests): an OPTIONS request to Patient with Origin/Access-Control-Request-* headers must return 204 No Content with the appropriate Access-Control-Allow-Origin/Methods/Headers and Max-Age response headers. The Allow-Headers value checks are warningOnly since header casing may vary by server.

test.name: OPTIONS preflight for Patient returns 204 with the appropriate CORS response headers
test.description: An OPTIONS request with Origin, Access-Control-Request-Method: PUT, and Access-Control-Request-Headers: authorization,content-type must return HTTP 204 No Content and echo back the allowed origin/methods/headers plus a max-age of 1440 seconds.

operation.description: Send a CORS preflight OPTIONS request to Patient with Origin and Access-Control-Request-* headers

assert.description: Preflight OPTIONS request must return HTTP 204 No Content
Access-Control-Allow-Origin must reflect the requesting origin
Access-Control-Allow-Methods must be present and include the requested method
Access-Control-Allow-Headers should include 'authorization' (warningOnly: casing may vary by server)
Access-Control-Allow-Headers should include 'content-type' (warningOnly: casing may vary by server)
